allow: Bash(TODAY_OVERRIDE=1 bash -c 'input=$\(cat\); script_dir="$\(pwd\)/.claude/hooks"; repo_root="$\(pwd\)"; changes="$\(git -C "$repo_root" status --porcelain 2>/dev/null\)"; [ -z "$changes" ] && { echo no-changes; exit 0; }; today=1999-01-01; logged=0; for f in "$repo_root"/docs/progress/*.md; do [ "$\(basename "$f"\)" = "_index.md" ] && continue; grep -qF "$today" "$f" && { logged=1; break; }; done; [ "$logged" -eq 0 ] && { echo "would block \(exit 2\)"; exit 0; }')
